name: Cabbage Relish
recipeIngredient: 1/4 small Head green cabbage, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
Makes about 4 cups
Finely chop the first three ingredients in a processor. Bring all remaining ingredients to a boil in a heavy medium saucepan. Add the chopped vegetables. Reduce heat and simmer until vegetables are tender, about 15 minutes, stirring occasionally (mixture will be thin). Cool, cover and refrigerate until well chilled. Can be prepared up to 5 days ahead. Drain before serving.
Origin: Bon Appetit Favourite Restaurant Recipes
Shared by: Sharon Stevens.
